Wrote the lane artifacts at [agent-adapter.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM784VTSZNNSS188H0D31JCJ/worktree/outputs/agent-integration/agent-adapter.md) and [review.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM784VTSZNNSS188H0D31JCJ/worktree/outputs/agent-integration/review.md). They pin the decision to the current tree: `fabro/programs/myosu-product.yaml` only contains reviewed `play:tui` and `agent:experience` lanes, product still has no `implement/` family surfaces, the old robopoker path blocker is already cleared, and the remaining gaps are product-owned implementation work. The recommended next move is a separate product implementation family, not another upstream-unblock loop.

Verification: `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/myosu-cargo-target cargo test -p myosu-games` passed with 10 unit tests and 4 doctests, and `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/myosu-cargo-target cargo test -p myosu-tui` passed with 84 unit tests and 1 doctest. The artifacts also record one honesty constraint: there is no repo-local `.raspberry/` state in this worktree, so the conclusion is grounded in committed manifests, curated outputs, and fresh proof commands.
